name: gallodoc
summary: GalloDoc Core v3 — Portable Operational Intelligence Document Standard. Adds the gallodoc-core/v3 envelope alongside the preserved v1; consolidates trust + relationships + source + lifecycle blocks; introduces an optional federation top-level. Parallel v1 validation stays for a 6-month deprecation window beginning 2026-05-16.
